local_broker.title: Local MQTT Broker
local_broker.description: Configure the connection to your local Mosquitto MQTT broker. Used for MQTT Discovery and script command routing.

data_description.local_host: Hostname or IP address of the local MQTT broker (e.g. localhost).
data_description.local_port: TCP port the broker listens on (default: 1883).

cloud_broker.title: Cloud MQTT Broker (Flespi)
cloud_broker.description: Configure the Flespi cloud MQTT broker for heartbeat, system metrics, availability status, and notifications.

data_description.cloud_username: Flespi access token used as the MQTT username.
data_description.cloud_password: Leave blank for Flespi token-based auth.
data_description.cloud_tls: Enable TLS/SSL encryption for the cloud connection.
data_description.node_id: Unique identifier for this node (used in MQTT topic paths). Defaults to hostname.

features.title: Feature Selection
features.description: Enable or disable individual Sentinel Link features.

data_description.availability_beacon: Publish online/offline status to the cloud broker.
data_description.system_metrics: Periodically publish CPU, RAM, disk and temperature to the cloud broker.
data_description.notification_forward: Forward Home Assistant persistent notifications to the cloud broker.
data_description.script_control: Create HA entities (switch, sensor, button) for each registered script.
data_description.metrics_interval: How often (in seconds) to collect and publish system metrics.
data_description.disk_mounts: Comma-separated list of mount points to monitor (e.g. /, /mnt/data).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the MQTT broker. Check host, port, and credentials.
error.timeout: Connection attempt timed out. The broker may be unreachable.
error.tls_error: TLS configuration error. Verify certificates or disable TLS.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Sentinel Link — Scripts

data_description.action: Choose an action to manage scripts, or select Next to proceed to feature settings.

data_description.availability_beacon: Publish online/offline LWT status to the cloud broker.
data_description.system_metrics: Periodically publish CPU, RAM, disk and temperature to the cloud broker.
data_description.notification_forward: Forward Home Assistant persistent notifications to the cloud broker.
data_description.script_control: Create HA entities for each registered script.
data_description.metrics_interval: How often (in seconds) to collect and publish system metrics.
data_description.disk_mounts: Comma-separated list of mount points to monitor.

script_edit.title: Add / Edit Script
script_edit.description: Configure a script entity. Script ID must be unique (letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens).

error.script_id_invalid: Script ID must contain only letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
error.script_id_duplicate: A script with this ID already exists.

run_script.name: Run Script
run_script.description: Execute a Sentinel Link script with a given action.
